# visibleItemIndexes()

**Instance Method**

Returns the indexes of the view’s currently visible items.

## Declaration

```swift
func visibleItemIndexes() -> IndexSet!
```

## Return Value

A set containing the indexes.

## Getting Item Information

- **indexOfItem(at:)**: Returns the index of the item at the specified location.
- **itemFrame(at:)**: Returns the frame rectangle for the item located at the specified index.
- **cellForItem(at:)**: Returns the browser cell for the item at the specified index.

items.description: Returns the index of the item at the specified location.
